description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, matte black finish and a streamlined profile. The frame and slide are both robust and angular, with minimal external embellishments, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The grip is slightly contoured for ergonomic handling, with a smooth surface and subtle paneling, lacking any visible texturing or logos. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement and safety. The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and does not feature any external threading or compensators. There are no visible markings, engravings, or serial numbers on the slide or frame, contributing to its understated and functional look.
description: A matte black, modern semi-automatic handgun with a smooth, contoured grip and a streamlined, unmarked slide. The design is minimalistic and utilitarian, with no visible embellishments.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the handgun, including the smooth grip, rounded trigger guard, and unmarked slide.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat, featureless slide and the rounded rear of the handgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the first view, with the same smooth grip and minimalistic slide.
description_view_3: Front-on view showing the muzzle, rounded trigger guard, and the width of the slide.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is gently contoured with a smooth, matte surface and subtle paneling along the sides. It lacks visible checkering, stippling, or texturing, and there are no logos, finger grooves, or decorative embellishments present. The grip appears to be made of polymer or a similar synthetic material, designed for a comfortable and secure hold.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth finish and no visible undercuts or squared-off edges. It is of standard size, providing sufficient space for finger placement, and does not feature any integrated accessories or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, with no distinctive texturing or embellishments.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, compensators, or fluting, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or special features are present on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is completely smooth and unmarked, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, caliber designations, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly beveled, with a smooth finish and no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no extended or flared features.
